_doc: CANONICAL Bonsai-display-name -> GitHub-handle map. Used by the TICKETED rail (future) to resolve the reviewer from the Bonsai Reviewer field. The PR-first rail does NOT read this at runtime — it uses the reusables' default-reviewer-handle input (default Maria) plus the per-repo PR_REVIEWER_HANDLE Actions-variable override. The box copy at driver-bonsai-mcp/config/reviewers.json is retained for the ticketed-rail orchestrator's Bonsai reassignment; reconcile the two copies to one source in Phase 4.
